R1: executed_by(tree, 'scan customer against databases', 'system') and exists(tree, 'scan customer against databases')
R2: exists(tree, 'retain identity check history') and activity_sends(tree, 'retain identity check history', 'identityCheckHistory')

R3: data_leads_to_absence(tree, 'accountBalance < 0', 'End Activity') or (condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'accountBalance < 0', 'approve negative balance', scope='branch') and (executed_by(tree, 'approve negative balance', 'bank manager') or condition_eventually_follows(tree, '(accountBalance < 0) and (customerType == "VIP")', 'approve negative balance', scope='branch')))
